notes_for_next_session: CLEAN SLATE as of 2026-06-02 housekeeping. (1) The session journal was archived to session_journal_archive.jsonl and reset to empty — start fresh; there are 0 real trades so nothing was lost. (2) watchlist.json and research.json were cleared to empty — do NOT treat any leftover INFY entry as a live candidate; INFY was a structural no-go (far below 200d EMA). (3) PREMARKET REDESIGN IS LIVE (master): the 8:30 AM premarket scan now builds a PURELY SENTIMENT-DRIVEN watchlist from Perplexity — it no longer filters on price or trade volume (only the earnings blackout is a hard exclude) and it NEVER places orders. All volume/indicator judgement + buying belongs to the 10:00 AM open-market agent. (4) NEW EOD STEP: the 3:45 PM EOD agent now clears the watchlist + research at end of day (Part 8), so a stale watchlist should not recur. (5) If tomorrow's premarket produces an empty watchlist, that's a real anomaly (API/trigger), not the old structural bug. Keep an eye on the premarket scan TRIGGER actually firing pre-open and on erratic agent scheduling.
